productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Women's Fitted Yoga Black Track Pant
description: CompositionStretchable, fitted black track pants made of 100% cotton with spandex technology,soft elastic waist band and flattened seamFit ComfortWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print These black pants made of stretchable cotton fabric is an essential garment in any woman's wardrobe. This bottom from urban yoga is specially designed with spandex for easy movement, while the cotton fabric keeps you dry, comfortable and fresh. For high comfort, the main brand label is printed and not stitched to avoid irritation near the waist, while the seams are flattened to avoid abrasion. You can couple this with a comfortable top - be it comfort fit or a long, loose one - for exercise regimes or just add on a stylish kurti to double this track pant into a chudidar. Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 39"Height-5'8”, Waist - 26”, Hips – 36”
